request.description:
Generated from cURL: curl --location --request POST 'http://127.0.0.1:9981/rpc/Room.Busi/CreateBusiness' \
--header 'X-RPCX-MessageID: 10000' \
--header 'X-RPCX-MesssageType: 0' \
--header 'X-RPCX-SerializeType: 1' \
--header 'X-RPCX-ServicePath: Room.Busi' \
--header 'X-RPCX-ServiceMethod: CreateBusiness' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--data-raw '{
   "uid": 600004995,
   "property": "business",
   "factoryType": "business-music",
   "settleChannel": "music",
   "appId": 70,
   "name": "拉拉队2",
   "is_backend": true,
   "is_create": true,
   "sex": 2
}'
